transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Hi, I ordered a new card nearly two weeks ago and it hasn't arrived. Is something wrong?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Cards usually take two to three weeks, so you're still within the normal window. Just wait a bit longer.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Two to three weeks? The website said five to seven working days. It's already been ten working days.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Yeah, sometimes it takes longer depending on Royal Mail. There's nothing I can do until it's been a full three weeks.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Can you at least check it went to the right address?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I don't have that in front of me right now. You'd need to go into a branch for that.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: This is unacceptable. Can I speak to a manager?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: They'll tell you the same thing. Call back after three weeks if it still hasn't come.

planted_violations: failed to verify customer identity before accessing account
provided incorrect delivery timeframe (stated 2-3 weeks instead of 5-7 working days)
refused to check dispatch address or take any remedial action
denied escalation request without offering supervisor
